name: Compliance Sign-Off
description: Reads isolation-audit, permission-matrix, secrets-vault-plan, and audit-design contracts to produce a final compliance summary: GDPR data isolation compliance status, SOC 2 Type II security controls coverage, ISO 27001 relevant controls addressed, outstanding gaps requiring additional work, and remediation timeline. Final human-reviewed gate — requires operator/DPO sign-off before hardening changes are applied to production.

checks.fail: isolation-audit contract not available — compliance summary cannot be produced
permission-matrix contract not available — compliance summary cannot be produced
secrets-vault-plan contract not available — compliance summary cannot be produced

checks.pass: audit-design contract available — proceeding with compliance summary generation
checks.fail: audit-design contract not available — compliance summary cannot be produced

checks.prompt: Using the isolation-audit, permission-matrix, secrets-vault-plan, and audit-design contracts, produce a comprehensive multi-tenant hardening compliance summary: (1) GDPR data isolation compliance status — assess whether the tenant isolation model satisfies GDPR data segregation requirements (Articles 25 and 32), identify any gaps, and rate overall GDPR compliance readiness, (2) SOC 2 Type II security controls coverage — map the implemented controls to the five Trust Services Criteria (Security, Availability, Processing Integrity, Confidentiality, Privacy) and identify which criteria have gaps, (3) ISO 27001 relevant controls addressed — identify which Annex A controls are covered by the hardening work completed (isolation, permissions, secrets, audit) and which remain unaddressed, (4) outstanding gaps requiring additional work — produce a prioritised list of remaining compliance gaps categorised by severity: critical (must fix before production), high (fix within 30 days), medium (fix within 90 days), (5) remediation timeline — provide a realistic schedule for addressing each outstanding gap. NOTE: this summary is the final gate before production deployment of hardening changes. It requires explicit sign-off by the DPO and/or CISO — this step cannot be automated or bypassed.
checks.pass: Compliance summary produced — GDPR, SOC 2 Type II, and ISO 27001 coverage assessed with gaps and remediation timeline
checks.fail: Compliance summary incomplete — one or more frameworks not assessed
